g.text: C1/C2 100 nF and C3 bulk placeholder are provisional. Place local capacitors close to U1 supply/return pins after datasheet verification.

g.text: Embedded symbols use PCB_glove_Draft IDs because their cached graphics/pin types are intentionally provisional; refresh and verify against current libraries and ST data before layout.
